name: numeric-ambiguity-fail
description: 271142 re-encoded as a numeric question (no choices). The digit 1 appears at both the hundreds (100) and thousands (1000) place — two defensible answers. AMBIGUITY must fire even without distractors. Proves the numeric branch still catches the canonical place-value bug.

question.question: In 271142, what is the value of the digit 1?
question.explanation: The 1 is in the hundreds place, so its value is 100.
